allow: Bash(npx skills find document 2>/dev/null || npx skills find docs 2>/dev/null || npx skills find content 2>/dev/null)
Bash(curl -s "https://skills.sh/api/skills/tavily-ai/research" 2>/dev/null | head -100 || echo "无法获取详情")
Bash(curl -s "https://skills.sh/api/skills/composiohq/awesome-claude-skills/content-research-writer" 2>/dev/null | head -100 || echo "无法获取详情")
Bash(npx skills info am-will/codex-skills/markdown-url 2>/dev/null || echo "无 info 命令")
Bash(npx skills view am-will/codex-skills/markdown-url 2>/dev/null || echo "无 view 命令")

Bash(curl -s "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/am-will/codex-skills/main/skills/markdown-url/SKILL.md" 2>/dev/null || curl -s "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/am-will/codex-skills/main/skills/markdown-url/skill.md" 2>/dev/null || curl -s "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/am-will/codex-skills/master/skills/markdown-url/SKILL.md" 2>/dev/null || echo "未找到 SKILL.md")
Bash(cd ~/.claude/skills/tech-doc-expander && bun install 2>&1 || npm install 2>&1 | head -20)
Bash(curl -s "https://www.aivi.fyi/sitemap.xml" 2>/dev/null | grep -o 'https://www.aivi.fyi/[^<]*openclaw[^<]*' | head -10 || curl -s "https://www.aivi.fyi/robots.txt" 2>/dev/null | grep -i sitemap)
Bash(git init && git add -A && git status)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: 添加tech-doc-expander智能技术文档扩展器技能

- 添加完整的技能目录结构，包含SKILL.md定义文件
- 添加8个TypeScript脚本实现（fetcher、analyzer、generator等）
- 添加npm依赖配置（package.json、package-lock.json）
- 添加文档模板和安装指南
- 添加技能索引文档（INDEX.md）
EOF
\)")
Bash(git remote add origin https://github.com/baoJiePro/skillsInfo.git && git remote -v)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: 添加OpenClaw多Agent团队配置及技术文档

- 新增12个Agent角色配置（CEO、CTO、产品、设计、全栈等）
- 添加飞书配置指南和OpenClaw多Agent使用文档
- 更新Claude设置允许命令列表
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
chore: 更新配置并添加文档备份

- 更新Claude设置允许命令列表
- 添加openclaw-mult-agent.md备份文件
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
docs: 优化Agent配置和文档结构

- 增强所有Agent角色的任务协作模式定义
- 精简openclaw-mult-agent.md文档内容
- 更新Claude设置允许命令列表
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
docs: 修正配置说明，删除无效参数

- 清理openclaw-mult-agent.md中的错误配置说明
- 更新Claude设置允许命令列表
EOF
\)")
Bash(git add ".claude/settings.local.json" && git commit -m "chore: 更新命令历史记录")
